title: More Nonsense Limerick 56
content:
There was an old person of Newry,
    Whose manners were tinctured with fury;
    He tore all the rugs, 
    And broke all the jugs,
    Within twenty miles' distance of Newry.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 56"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
